description: Ionic radius overrides and fallback rules used before mendeleev ionic radii.

ionic_radius_overrides_pm.note: P4+ has no available ionic radius in mendeleev; use the P5+ radius as a project fallback.
Project convention: H+ radius is set to 0 pm instead of using negative Shannon effective radii; charge density is treated as 0 when radius is 0.

ionic_radius_overrides_pm.source: Baur, 1976; also used in some bond-valence parameter libraries.
